name: govbridge-root
description: Root package.json để quản lý và chạy song song Frontend & Backend trong 1 lệnh

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
